VLINCS no-anchor iteration

Seq7771 Best-Crop Component-82 P005 Gain

A seq7771 best-crop CTF pass makes component 82 a stable generated-positive target. The focused SigLIP scheduler proposes rank17, moving seq3403 from comp11/gid96000012 to comp82/gid960000202. Canonical p005_area IDF1 improves from 0.669466 to 0.669494.

Metric
0.669494
canonical p005_area IDF1
Delta
0.000028
vs baseline 0.669466
Pipeline module

M2/M3 + M7/M10 + M8 + M12

Best-crop generated-positive CTF stabilizes component 82 as a scheduler target; M8 moves one residual island seq3403; M12 verifies direct, density_simple, and p005_area delivery.

Used in pipelinecandidate-only now; eligible to become next default after reproduce.sh verification and demo.sh integration
No-anchor statusTrue
Method flow

How the run was produced

StepModuleInputActionOutput
1M2/M3raw crops for seq7771 plus hard counters 8315/8336use best-crop-only generated-positive admission after DINOv2/SigLIP CTFseq7771 DINOv2/SigLIP source CTF 3/3 and 3/3
2M7/M10previous best assignment plus SigLIP primary fused with weakmetric and DINO featuresrerun MCAM08-focused local subpart schedulerSigLIP rank17 candidate: seq3403 comp11 -> comp82
3M8rank17 candidate manifestmaterialize only seq3403; no broad component mergeassignment sha 14a0c6a3a06724fbc7dc6abfd995f05ac48640aab72b15706876cd5bddc2d8cd
4M12fresh assignment zipscore direct, density_simple, then p005_area with config_name and dropped-row checkscanonical p005_area IDF1 0.669494
Implementation

What changed

No anchors or GT labels are used as identity evidence. The method starts from the previous no-anchor best assignment, rebuilds a MCAM08-focused SigLIP/weak/DINO subpart candidate manifest from tracklet features, materializes SigLIP rank17 as a one-tracklet repair, exports a fresh submission zip, runs direct full-score, then validates density_simple and p005_area. GT is used only by the evaluator after materialization.

Failure mode and fix

1 component cases, 1 tracklet/frame examples, 1 embedded images. Embedded images remove the local file:// path dependency when this deck is opened from the browser or copied to Bitbucket.

Seq7771 best-crop target-82 repair: seq3403

SigLIP rank17 moves seq3403 from comp11/gid96000012 to comp82/gid960000202 after component 82 is admitted as a DINO/SigLIP-stable generated-positive target.
